user.title: Xiaomi Home Devices
user.description: Choose the Xiaomi Home cloud region used by your devices.

auth.title: Authorize Xiaomi Home
auth.description:
Open this URL and sign in. Xiaomi will redirect to `http://homeassistant.local:8123`; paste the final redirected URL or only the `code` value here:

{auth_url}

error.cannot_connect: Unable to authenticate with Xiaomi Home.

abort.already_configured: This Xiaomi Home account and region are already configured.
